subject: Sports
title: Lakers vs Celtics: Basketball's Epic War
description: A micro-lesson that makes Lakers vs Celtics: Basketball's Epic War usable.

hook.text: Purple and gold vs green and white. Lakers vs Celtics is the NBA's most storied and bitter rivalry.

buildup.text: They have met in the NBA Finals 12 times—more than any other pairing. Boston leads the series 9-3.

discovery.text: The 1980s rivalry between Magic Johnson and Larry Bird revived the NBA from near-irrelevance.

twist.text: Magic and Bird started as fierce enemies. They became best friends—even doing TV commercials together.

climax.text: Their rivalry is credited with saving the NBA. Commissioner David Stern called them 'the two who made it happen.'

punchline.text: Two players who hated each other ended up saving the sport they loved.

quiz.question: How many times have the Lakers and Celtics met in the NBA Finals?
